audit_items.proof_trace: Columns from EL (engine_getBlobs) bypass gossip verification via new_for_block_publishing, which skips signature, parent, inclusion proof, and KZG verification, yet are treated as gossip-verified when passed to process_gossip_data_columns. Malicious local EL can inject invalid columns that bypass all consensus validation.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Compromised local EL returns crafted columns via engine_getBlobs with invalid signatures/proofs. These bypass gossip checks via new_for_block_publishing (L221-250), get published to network via publish_column_sidecars, and propagated as valid. Network peers reject them after full verification, causing failed block import and potential slashing.
